title: The World of Cloud Computing
content: Cloud computing has transformed how organizations store data and run applications. Instead of maintaining large numbers of physical servers, companies can access computing resources through online platforms. This flexibility allows businesses to scale services quickly according to demand. Maria first encountered cloud computing while working on a web application project. She was impressed by how easily new environments could be created and managed. Tasks that once required expensive hardware could now be completed within minutes. Although understanding cloud services required study and practice, the benefits became clear over time. Today, cloud computing plays a central role in many modern technology solutions.
